debug_info.goal:
I : FKS.Inputs
x₀ σ₂ c : ℝ
N K : ℕ
hlog : log x₀ > 1000
hσ₂ : σ₂ ∈ Set.Ioo 0.9 1
hc : c ∈ Set.Icc 2 30
hN : N ≥ 1
hK : K ≥ 1
⊢ ∀ x ≥ x₀, Eψ x ≤ FKS.ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K

failed_attempts:
intro x hx
  -- ε is non-negative
  have hε_nn : (0 : ℝ) ≤ ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K := theorem_1_1_eps_nonneg I x₀ σ₂ c N K hlog hσ₂ hc
  -- Case split on whether x > 0
  by_cases hx_pos : x > 0
  · -- x > 0 case: need log x > 1000
    -- Since log x₀ > 1000, either x₀ > 0 or x₀ < -1 (because log x = log |x|)
    -- If x₀ > 0: x ≥ x₀ > 0 and log x ≥ log x₀ > 1000
    -- If x₀ < -1: x ≥ x₀ and x > 0, log x might not be > 1000
    by_cases hx₀_pos : x₀ > 0
    · have hlog_x : log x > 1000 := lt_of_lt_of_le hlog (Real.log_le_log hx₀_pos hx)
      calc Eψ x ≤ ε I x σ₂ c N K :=
            theorem_1_1_pointwise I x σ₂ c N K hx_pos hlog_x hσ₂ hc hN hK
        _ ≤ ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K :=
            theorem_1_1_antitone I σ₂ c N K hσ₂ hc hN hK hx₀_pos hx_pos hlog hlog_x hx
    · -- x₀ ≤ 0 but x > 0: degenerate case (x₀ < 0 with log |x₀| > 1000)
      push_neg at hx₀_pos
      exact theorem_1_1_neg_x0 I x₀ σ₂ c N K hlog hσ₂ hc hN hK hx₀_pos x hx_pos hx
  · -- x ≤ 0 case: Eψ x = |ψ x - x| / x ≤ 0 ≤ ε
    push_neg at hx_pos
    have : Eψ x ≤ 0 := by
      unfold Eψ
      exact div_nonpos_of_nonneg_of_nonpos (abs_nonneg _) hx_pos
    linarith
